scripts.spinfall: wasm-pack build arcadia-rs --target web && cd templates/spinfall-arena && bun run dev
scripts.downleaf: wasm-pack build arcadia-rs --target web && cd templates/downleaf && bun run dev
scripts.format: bun run format:rs && bun run format:spinfall-arena && bun run format:downleaf
scripts.lint: bun run lint:rs && bun run lint:spinfall-arena && bun run lint:downleaf
